title: ARTS, PARKS, LIBRARIES, AND COMMUNITY ENRICHMENT COMMITTEE REPORT directing the Department of Animal Services to report on the current rules for allowing elected officials and their staff into Department facilities, including non-public areas, and related matters.

appearances.section: Items for which Public Hearings Have Been Held
appearances.recommendation: DIRECT the Department of Animal Services to report on the current rules for allowing elected officials and their staff into Department facilities, including non-public areas. The report should specify any notice or supervision requirements and recommend how to facilitate timely and safe access for Councilmembers and staff, including with Department accompaniment, without requiring a formal appointment process. Fiscal Impact Statement: Neither the City Administrative Officer nor the Chief Legislative Analyst has completed a financial analysis of this report. Community Impact Statement: None submitted Report from Arts, Parks, Libraries, and Community Enrichment Committee dated 10-28-25 Motion (McOsker - Blumenfield) dated 10-22-25

attachments.text: Report from Arts, Parks, Libraries, and Community Enrichment Committee dated 10-28-25
